---
title: "Reginald Julian Albany Bowles"
---

## Reginald Julian Albany Bowles

**Dates:** (1891-21 July 1916)

### Description

great-nephew of CMY

### Biography

Only son of Henry and Alethea Bowles. He was christened in July 1891.

### Letters

- Letter from February 26, 1901
- Letter from Aug 1 [1900]
- Letter from May 2 [1900]
- Letter from Feb 1st [1900]
- Letter from Oct 10 [1899]
- Letter from [1899-1900?]
- Letter from July 1st [1897]
- Letter from May 13th [1897]
- Letter from May 3d [1897]
- Letter from Aug 11th [1891]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
